sections.paragraph:
ἐκπερισσῶς adv. pert. to being beyond normal limits, extraordinarily ἐ. λαλεῖν say with great emphasis Mk 14:31 (PJoüon, RSR 29, ’39, 240f).—S. DELG s.v. περί.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

RSR RSR = Recherches de science religieuse—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 307
